title: Fix UNUSED / UNDRIVEN for unused functions (#6893)

features.name: unused function with real parameter
features.description: Code should include a function with a real-typed parameter that is never called, which triggers spurious UNUSEDSIGNAL warnings on the parameter

features.name: unused function with local int variable and $rtoi
features.description: Code should include a function with a local int variable assigned from $rtoi conversion that is never called, which triggers spurious UNDRIVEN warnings

features.name: unused function with bit variable derived from local result
features.description: Code should include a function with a bit variable assigned from a local int result that is never called, which triggers spurious UNUSEDSIGNAL warnings

features.name: automatic function declaration
features.description: Code should include an automatic function definition with parameters and local variables that is never invoked from the module
